title: Youtube Poop The Valley Place What Contains Some Dinosaurs HQ
description:
Dear viewers, 
One of the best YouTube Poop makers on the internet, WalrusGuy, has closed  his account.
In order to ensure his  awesome videos live on, I  have taken the opportunity to re-upload them. I did not  make any of these.
Thank you.

Update: According to more breaking info, it turns out he was actually hacked.  Either way, I shall upload these videos during his hiatus for all to keep enjoying.

Update: He's back, but now he's quit YouTube Poop, so I may as well keep these posted.

This video was uploaded October 31, 2008 Exact description below.

To celebrate Halloween, I present... another poop based on an old dinosaur cartoon. It may be of interest that I wrote down several jokes I wanted to use while watching the episode of "Valley of the Dinosaurs" I edited to make this, but ended up using almost entirely different ones instead.
